mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT pr.production_code AS productionCode, pr.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, pr.production_qty AS productionQty, pr.production_status AS productionStatus, st.code_contents AS productionStatusName, pr.complete_date AS completeDate, pr.reg_emp_no AS regEmpNo, pr.reg_date AS regDate, pr.cancel_reason AS cancelReason
FROM production pr
JOIN product p ON pr.product_code = p.product_code
LEFT JOIN status_type st ON st.bcode = 510 AND st.mcode = pr.production_status
ORDER BY pr.production_code DESC ) a ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT DISTINCT p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName FROM bom b JOIN product p ON b.product_code = p.product_code ORDER BY p.product_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO production ( production_code, product_code, production_qty, production_status, complete_date, reg_emp_no, reg_date ) VALUES ( seq_production_code.NEXTVAL, #{productCode}, #{productionQty}, 1, REPLACE(#{completeDate}, '-', ''), #{regEmpNo}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT pr.production_code AS productionCode, pr.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, pr.production_qty AS productionQty, pr.production_status AS productionStatus, st.code_contents AS productionStatusName, pr.complete_date AS completeDate, pr.reg_emp_no AS regEmpNo, pr.reg_date AS regDate, pr.cancel_reason AS cancelReason
FROM production pr JOIN product p ON pr.product_code = p.product_code LEFT JOIN status_type st ON st.bcode = 510 AND st.mcode = pr.production_status WHERE pr.production_code = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE production SET product_code = #{productCode}, production_qty = #{productionQty}, production_status = #{productionStatus}, complete_date = REPLACE(#{completeDate}, '-', ''), cancel_reason = #{cancelReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE production_code = #{productionCode}
